subject: Re: Trump!
body: I gave him benefit of doubt on a whole bunch of stuff and agree that we need to shake things up. But this ban is just wrong and I really don't see how it helps him.

body: oh no you too/ I have been fielding similar emails calls texts ALL DAY, it will all turn out ok. shaking things up will bring about hopefully positive change. he won and his people won, this is what his people want. cant be sore losers.
